subcodes.first_line: O friends! All praise be unto God that ye are wanderers in the wilderness of divine love and seekers lost in the desert of the affection of God, devoted dwellers in the precinct of companionship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ياران ، الحمد للّه سر گشته باديه عشقيد و گمگشته صحرای محبّت اللّه معتکف کوی ياريد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God
